race.description: Jr Richards & Sons Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: REDALUCA GIRL (11) is trending the right way with minor placings in her last two and should be at her top now fourth-up. Gets a good chance to finally break through. BINDAREE LASS (7) was prominent into the straight last time but faltered late to finish sixth over 1400m at Warren. Drops back slightly in trip and this looks a nice race for her. TARRANT COUNTY (15) only warmed late at Tamworth when resuming from a long break. Is sure to have come on from that and keeps Gallagher. Can improve sharply. MOON TREATY (4) chased gamely into the placings last week. Backs up quickly and is in the mix.
